name: The Dry
overview: In the series, when Shiv Sheridan returns to Dublin after years of partying in London, she is sober and full of good intentions – but being back with her family makes staying on ‘the dry' much harder than she expected. As Shiv tries to navigate this new phase of her life, so must her family and they all have issues they don't want to face.

trailers.title: The Dry Official Trailer | Streaming on BritBox from 5th May 2022
